testcase.name: test_list_returns_25_with_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 25 experts, got 22 assert 22 == 25 + where 22 = len([{'availability': 'Available next week', 'bio': 'Kwame Osei is a senior consulting practitioner with 15 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include growth strategy, market entry, m&a diligence.', 'category': 'Consulting', 'certifications': ['MBA'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'David Okonkwo is a senior engineering practitioner with 15 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include structural analysis, seismic design, steel design.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': ['PE', 'SE'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Sarah Chen is a senior design & ux practitioner with 11 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include product design, design systems, user research.', 'category': 'Design & UX', 'certifications': ['Nielsen Norman UX'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Jonathan Pierce is a senior accounting & tax practitioner with 16 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include fundraising, financial modeling, cap tables.', 'category': 'Accounting & Tax', 'certifications': ['MBA', 'CPA'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Leah Abramson is a senior engineering practitioner with 10 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include llm ops, retrieval, model evaluation.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': [], ...}, {'availability': 'Available next week', 'bio': 'Ana Ferreira is a senior engineering practitioner with 13 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include distributed systems, kafka, cloud architecture.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': ['AWS Solutions Architect Pro'], ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:53: in test_list_returns_25_with_required_fields assert len(data) == 25, f"expected 25 experts, got {len(data)}" E AssertionError: expected 25 experts, got 22 E assert 22 == 25 E + where 22 = len([{'availability': 'Available next week', 'bio': 'Kwame Osei is a senior consulting practitioner with 15 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include growth strategy, market entry, m&a diligence.', 'category': 'Consulting', 'certifications': ['MBA'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'David Okonkwo is a senior engineering practitioner with 15 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include structural analysis, seismic design, steel design.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': ['PE', 'SE'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Sarah Chen is a senior design & ux practitioner with 11 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include product design, design systems, user research.', 'category': 'Design & UX', 'certifications': ['Nielsen Norman UX'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Jonathan Pierce is a senior accounting & tax practitioner with 16 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include fundraising, financial modeling, cap tables.', 'category': 'Accounting & Tax', 'certifications': ['MBA', 'CPA'], ...}, {'availability': 'Available now', 'bio': 'Leah Abramson is a senior engineering practitioner with 10 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include llm ops, retrieval, model evaluation.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': [], ...}, {'availability': 'Available next week', 'bio': 'Ana Ferreira is a senior engineering practitioner with 13 years of experience helping teams ship excellent work. Core focus areas include distributed systems, kafka, cloud architecture.', 'category': 'Engineering', 'certifications': ['AWS Solutions Architect Pro'], ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_search_q_tax

failure.message: AssertionError: expected experts matching 'tax' assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:74: in test_search_q_tax assert len(data) > 0, "expected experts matching 'tax'" E AssertionError: expected experts matching 'tax' E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_categories_aggregation

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 8 == 5 + where 8 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb139753e040>('Engineering') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb139753e040> = {'Accounting & Tax': 5, 'Compliance': 3, 'Consulting': 4, 'Design & UX': 5, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:96: in test_categories_aggregation assert by_cat.get("Engineering") == 5 E AssertionError: assert 8 == 5 E + where 8 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb139753e040>('Engineering') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb139753e040> = {'Accounting & Tax': 5, 'Compliance': 3, 'Consulting': 4, 'Design & UX': 5, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_fresh_expert_not_connected

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: register failed: 404 404 page not found
assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_worksoy_payouts.py:55: in fresh_expert bundle = _register("expert", "payexp") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_worksoy_payouts.py:40: in _register assert r.status_code == 200, f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: 404 404 page not found E E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
